case_title: ADRIANA TOUHEY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOUHEY, ADRIANA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-24-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-22-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-09-2010
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
OBJECTION TO COURT COMMISSIONER ACTING AS JUDGE PRO TEMPORE AT TRIAL PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 6.1(C) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR NOV-22-2010. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-04-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. SEP-24-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE DEC-02-2010.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR SUSAN A. OGDIE.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR MICHAEL ALBERT KELLY.
ARBITRATOR ROBERT THOMAS LYNCH APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION DEC-03-2010 THROUGH MAR-03-2011.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-04-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MONGAN, LEILA K. SUBSTITUTED FOR BLISS, KIMBERLY A. AS ATTORNEY FOR CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOUHEY, ADRIANA
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-04-2011 - CASE SETTLED BEFORE CONFERENCE. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON MAY-17-2011 AT 10:00 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-04-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-17-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
